{{Infobox character
| name = Charity
| parents = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]]}}
| children = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|living Forger technique}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Dream of Darkness]], [[Striker technique]], spiritual scan}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, Will-Heart Resonance technique}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Sage]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|, [[Archlady]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Overlady]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|, [[Sage of the Silver Heart]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura head family]], [[Akura clan|Akura family]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|jailer}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|mansion on the Akura floating mountain}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Moongrave]], [[Night Wheel Valley]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Underlord (novel)|Underlord]]
}}

''See also: [[Charity Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Charity is a [[Sage]] and a prominent leader within the [[Akura clan]], serving as one of its primary pillars alongside [[Malice]]. A descendant of a former [[Monarch]], she is driven by the clan's philosophy that humanity must remain harsh and strong to survive a dangerous world. Her legendary passion for human interests often puts her at odds with factions led by [[sacred beasts]]. Despite her reputation for being cold, callous, or even cruel, she possesses a motherly concern for certain individuals and is known to be easily swayed by her emotions. As a powerful practitioner, Charity utilizes the [[Book of the Silver Heart]], which contains seven techniques involving dreams and shadows. She also possesses the ability to harvest the essences of [[Remnants]] to create various constructs. Her presence is characterized by a sense of dignity and calm, often aided by her ability to [[veil]] her spirit. In her leadership role, she manages clan resources, oversees the training of new generations, and maintains significant spatial portals. Following the death of her grandmother, her responsibilities within the clan have increased significantly.}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Charity is an [[Akura]] aunt who maintains a strict intolerance for cheating. As a [[Sage]] distinguished by her purple eyes, she holds a position of authority within the clan. Following [[Mercy]]'s advancement, the young woman is required to report directly to Charity to arrange for transport.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Charity]] is an [[Akura]] aunt.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Charity]] does not tolerate cheating.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7">''Underlord'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Charity]] is a [[Sage]] with purple eyes.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13">''Underlord'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Charity]] is [[Mercy]]'s aunt.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]] must report to [[Charity]] for transport after advancing.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Charity]] is a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Charity]] has purple eyes.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|An [[Archlady]] and acquaintance of [[Lindon]], Charity provides close combat training programs for [[Coppers]] that cover defensive techniques, weaponry, and movement. Her living [[Forger technique]] utilizes silver-and-purple owls crafted from her unique blend of shadow and dream madra, a substance that causes [[Dross]] headaches. While wearing [[sacred arts]] robes, she observes the [[arena]] from her mansion on the [[Akura]] floating mountain, where she watches [[Lindon]] on a display and provides him with scales. Throughout the events, she expresses concern for team safety, gives [[Lindon]] a transmission construct, and observes [[Yerin]] blindfolding herself. Charity remains astonished by the fighting and even speculates that the [[dragon]] girl might eventually become a [[Sage]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">18</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] is [[Lindon]]'s acquaintance/peer.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] provides training programs for [[Coppers]] in close combat.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] took [[Lindon]] through examples of movement, weapon, and defensive techniques.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] uses a silver-and-purple owl as part of her living [[Forger technique]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5">''Uncrowned'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]]'s [[Forger technique]] involves owls made of her own [[madra]], which is a blend of shadow and dream aspects.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] has a silver-and-purple owl.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6">''Uncrowned'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] is an [[Archlady]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] gave [[Lindon]] the transmission construct.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] is concerned about the safety of the teams.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] wears [[sacred arts]] robes.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] watches the [[arena]] from her mansion on the [[Akura]] floating mountain.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] watched [[Lindon]] on the display in the [[arena]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] provides scales to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] believes the [[dragon]] girl might become a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] watched [[Yerin]] blindfold herself.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] possesses [[madra]] that causes [[Dross]] headaches.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] was astonished by the fight.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Charity]] is someone [[Lindon]] does not want to look in the eye right now.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A member of the [[Akura head family]] and the daughter of [[Akura Fury]], Charity is an [[Overlady]] [[Sage]] who maintains a storehouse at [[Night Wheel Valley]]. During the [[Uncrowned ceremony]], she floated behind [[Mercy]] and utilized her sixth technique, the [[Dream of Darkness]], to widen a pool of shadow beneath them. While in [[Moongrave]], she provided [[Yerin]] with access to tournament records and trapped her within a boundary field to perform a spiritual scan. Charity also investigated [[Yan Shoumei]]'s [[Blood Shadow]], noting that such combat serves as excellent willpower training, and she eventually restrained [[Min Shuei]]. Alongside [[Min Shuei]], Charity was tasked with directly handling [[Lindon]]'s training.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">28</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] is a member of the [[Akura head family]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] floated behind [[Mercy]] during the [[Uncrowned ceremony]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] stood behind [[Mercy]] with an owl on her shoulder.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] widened a pool of darkness beneath the feet of [[Mercy]] and [[Charity]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] keeps a storehouse at the [[Night Wheel Valley]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]]'s sixth technique is the [[Dream of Darkness]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] is a person [[Lindon]] wants to convince to send him along.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] is a [[Sage]] in the [[Akura]] family.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] uses a [[Striker technique]] that creates silver-and-purple madra specters.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] is the daughter of an unnamed individual.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] can vanish into a pool of shadow.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] gave a warning to the [[Seishen King]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] suggested she would return to meet with [[Akura Fury]] soon.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] was supposed to take [[Lindon]] back to the tournament in two days.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] noted [[Lindon]]'s reservation at the [[Sundown Pavilion]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] is [[Fury]]'s daughter.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] has an owl perched on her shoulder and is the daughter of a man who needs to return to [[Sky's Edge]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] will be handling [[Lindon]]'s training directly alongside [[Min Shuei]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] has previously taken [[Lindon]] to Sky’s Edge.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] is located in [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] instructed [[Yerin]] to cycle the power to her head.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] set up a boundary field in which [[Yerin]] was trapped.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] performed a spiritual scan on [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] investigated [[Yan Shoumei]]'s [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] provided [[Yerin]] access to the records of the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] restrained [[Min Shuei]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] is an [[Overlady]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] stated that fighting a [[Blood Shadow]] is the best willpower training.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|As the [[Sage of the Silver Heart]], Charity maintained a masked expression while managing [[Lindon]]'s points and engaging in a private, unheard exchange with [[Uncle Fury]]. To facilitate an exit for [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]], she utilized a [[void key]] to expand the [[Sky’s Edge gate]] into a wide screen of darkness. During this process, she wielded three sacred instruments—a silver sickle, a [[steel]] shield bearing a grinning monstrous face, and a [[liquid steel]] tool of concealment—while using an owl to communicate. Charity further utilized purple-and-silver madra shields to protect a fleet of ships and traveled via a column of darkness. After providing essential information to [[Lindon]] and [[Dross]], she demonstrated her ability to open portals and animate techniques, though she had never directly commanded [[Dreadgods]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">18</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] is the [[Sage of the Silver Heart]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]]'s face was a mask.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] is taking care of [[Lindon]]'s points.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] had a long exchange with [[Uncle Fury]] that no one else could hear.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] is preparing [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]]'s exit.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] expanded the [[Sky’s Edge gate]] into a broad screen of darkness.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] possesses a [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] wields a silver sickle as a weapon.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] wields a [[steel]] shield with the image of a twisted, grinning, monstrous face.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] uses a [[sacred instrument]] of concealment and banishment made of [[liquid steel]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] uses three sacred instruments.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] uses a column of darkness to travel.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] has an owl that communicates.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] used shields of purple-and-silver madra to protect a string of ships.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] provided information to [[Lindon]] and [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] would have to thank [[Charity]] upon their return.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] has opened portals and brought techniques to [[life]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] had not commanded [[Dreadgods]] directly.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Charity]] is one of the two remaining pillars of the [[Akura]] family with [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Charity]] is [[Akura Malice]]'s granddaughter.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A member of the head family who is over a hundred and fifty years old, Charity reached the [[Archlord]] stage at a relatively young age before becoming a [[Sage]]. Although she has never attempted to advance to [[Monarch]], she swore an oath to [[Akura Malice]] to keep the connection between [[Dreadgods]] and [[Monarchs]] secret. While watching [[Moongrave]] from across the city, she took [[Mercy]] to the location and eventually intervened to assist [[Lindon]] during a [[Titan]]'s attack. A specialist in mental [[Enforcer techniques]], she utilizes the [[Will-Heart Resonance]] technique from her Book and carries a vibrating sickle. During combat, she can use a silver flash from [[Min Shuei]]'s soul to cleanse techniques while her spiritual perception sweeps over the city.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">13</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]] watches the city of [[Moongrave]] from across the city.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]] is a member of the head family.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]] has never attempted to advance to [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]] is over a hundred and fifty years old.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]] swore an oath to [[Akura Malice]] not to reveal the connection between [[Dreadgods]] and [[Monarchs]] without permission.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]] reached the [[Archlord]] stage relatively young and became a [[Sage]] not long after.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]] intervened to help [[Lindon]] retreat from the [[Titan]]'s attack.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]]'s spiritual perception passed over the city.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]] uses the [[Will-Heart Resonance]] technique from her Book.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]] can cleanse techniques using a silver flash from [[Min Shuei]]'s soul.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]] specializes in mental [[Enforcer techniques]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]] carries a vibrating sickle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]] took [[Mercy]] to [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|As a lesser [[sacred artist]], Charity maintains a connection to the [[Heart Icon]], though she initially struggled to withstand even a single strike from the [[Dreadgod weapon]]. After successfully awakening the [[Heart Icon]], she demonstrated techniques specifically suited for the role of a jailer, including the ability to overcome mental enhancements through the use of script formation within a cell. During a confrontation involving shadow swords, she appeared to be performing well before ultimately betraying [[Malice]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Charity]] is a lesser [[sacred artist]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Charity]] has a connection to the [[Heart Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Charity]] is hard-pressed to deal with a single attack from the [[Dreadgod weapon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Charity]] has awakened the [[Heart Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Charity]]'s techniques are suited to the role of jailer.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Charity]] can overcome mental enhancements with the aid of script formation in a cell.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Charity]] seemed all right during the fight against shadow swords.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] was betrayed by [[Charity]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Charity]] is in charge of the [[Ashwind continent]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Charity]] has a territory.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“We have reason to worry for the safety of our teams,” Charity said.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“It is my sixth technique,” Charity confirmed.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Pardon if this seems rude, but I have often wondered: are you the only Sage in the Akura family?”

“The only direct descendant.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“You will be busy before my father arrives,” Charity interrupted.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Then Charity swept in, one of her owls perched on her shoulder. “I’m afraid not. You’ll be accompanying my father back to Sky’s Edge immediately; we need him back in place without delay.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
